basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC - 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Nursing, Graduate in Science, PG in Science
qualification.details: Project Nurse: Graduate degree in Nursing with 3 years post-qualification experience and 2 years minimum experience in hospital-based clinical work, research projects, or quality-improvement initiatives. Project Technical Support: Three Years Graduate in Science with 3 years experience or PG in Science field, with 2 years minimum experience in hospital-based clinical work, research projects, or quality-improvement initiatives.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse: Rs 43,732 Project Technical Support: Rs 32,000

selection_process: Interview will be intimated through email for eligible/shortlisted candidates only. Only shortlisted candidates will be communicated via e-mail to appear in the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse and Project Technical Support positions is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Nurse?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Nurse position as per the official notification released by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Nurse?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Nurse post, candidates must possess a Graduate degree in Nursing along with relevant post-qualification and hospital-based experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Project Nurse and Project Technical Support positions is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Project Technical Support role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs 32,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment drive are to be submitted via email only.

faq.question: Q7. Does AIIMS Delhi offer any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, AIIMS Delhi offers age relaxation for SC/ST candidates (5 years) and OBC candidates (3 years) as per government norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these project-based roles?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for candidates applying for these positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
